evals.prompt: I need to create 3 tasks for my sprint on this board: https://github.com/orgs/Unity-Technologies/projects/101/views/44 -- oncall next week, then a design doc, then implementation. Assign them all to me.
evals.expected_output: Agent discovers project metadata via GraphQL, asks which repo to create issues in, creates 3 issues with assignee, adds them to the project board, and sets sprint/status/dates

evals.prompt: can you check what's currently in sprint 2 on our project board? https://github.com/orgs/Unity-Technologies/projects/101
evals.expected_output: Agent queries the project board items filtered by the current sprint iteration and presents the results

evals.prompt: move issue #12 in attribution-incidents to Done on the project board and set the release date to today
evals.expected_output: Agent discovers the project metadata, finds the item on the board, updates its status to Done and sets the release date field
